name: hazn-legacy
description: Hazn holding pen — content from v0.3.x that has not yet been split into purpose-built marketplace plugins. Auto-discovers remaining skills, agents, commands, and workflows. Extracted in Phase 1 (ADR-003): 7 runtime skills + brand configs + brand assets moved to the hazn plugin; shopify-revenue-audit skill + audit deliverable pipeline moved to the shopify-revenue-audit plugin; shopify-cro-audit deleted as superseded. Remaining content (websites, content pipelines, analytics, NGO, deliverables) will be drained over Phase 3+.
